exports.name: applyEvent
exports.signature: export function applyEvent(state: TaskState, event: TaskEvent): TaskState

reducer.note: The `>=` guard appears at L16 (task.updated case) and is repeated verbatim at L28 (task.status_changed), L40 (task.assigned), L52 (task.deleted). All mutation events use last-write-wins by timestamp; `task.created` and `task.snapshot` have no guard.
reducer.state_shape: Map<string, Task> — keyed by task.id (UUID string)

exports.name: Task
exports.signature: export interface Task { id: string; title: string; description: string; status: TaskStatus; assignee: string | null; createdBy: string; createdAt: number; updatedAt: number; }

exports.name: TaskEvent
exports.signature: Discriminated union: task.created | task.updated | task.status_changed | task.assigned | task.deleted | task.snapshot

exports.name: createTask
exports.signature: export function createTask(title: string, description: string, createdBy: string): Task

exports.name: useTaskStore
exports.signature: { tasks: Task[]; dispatch: (event: TaskEvent) => Promise<void>; loading: boolean }

dispatch_path: 3. group.sendApplicationRumor(rumor) → MLS group (may throw; failure emits notestr:taskPublishFailed CustomEvent)
Incoming MLS: group.on('applicationMessage', ...) → deserializeApplicationData → JSON.parse(rumor.content) as TaskEvent → applyEvent → setState
store.publish_failure_hook: window.__notestrTestPublishFailureOnce (string | null) — consumed once then nulled before sendApplicationRumor
store.mls_rumor_shape: { id, kind: 31337, content: JSON.stringify(taskEvent), tags: [['t','task']], created_at, pubkey }

test_hooks.name: __notestrTestGroups
test_hooks.signature: () => Array<{ idStr: string; nostrGroupIdHex: string; relays: string[] }>

test_hooks.name: __notestrTestSentRumors
test_hooks.purpose: Application rumors sent to a group

test_hooks.name: __notestrTestInspectGroupEvent
test_hooks.signature: (groupId: string, eventId: string) => Promise<{ event, firstIngest, secondIngest, rumor, currentEpoch }>

test_hooks.name: __notestrTestPersistedTaskEvents
test_hooks.purpose: Read persisted event log from IndexedDB

marmot_api.getGroupMembers: (state: ClientState) => string[]  // returns nostr pubkey hex strings
marmot_api.group_state_shape: ClientState = GroupState & PublicGroupState; PublicGroupState = { ratchetTree: RatchetTree; groupContext: GroupContext }; GroupContext = { version, cipherSuite, groupId, epoch: bigint, treeHash, ... }

MarmotGroup_surface.idStr: string — hex of MLS group id

device_list.props: { client: MarmotClient; group: MarmotGroup; pubkey: string; localClientId: string; relays: string[] }
device_list.scope_note: DeviceList renders ONLY the local identity's own pubkey leaves. Cross-pubkey leaf removal requires __notestrTestForgetLeaf. Forget button absent for isLocal leaves.

e2e_fixtures.purpose: User A bunker auth: authenticateViaBunker(page); E2E_BUNKER_PUBKEY_HEX, E2E_BUNKER_URL
User B bunker auth: authenticateAsBunkerB(page); USER_B_NPUB
User C bunker auth: authenticateAsBunkerC(page); USER_C_NPUB
NIP-46 bunker process; spawned by global-setup.ts
clearAppState(page) — clears localStorage + all notestr-* IndexedDB databases
Playwright fixture providing connected NDK instance

Canonical DSL verbs: authenticate, createGroup, inviteByNpub, selectGroup, leaveGroup, reload, addTaskViaUi, dispatchTaskEvent, getPubkeyHex, currentGroupId, moveTaskToNext, deleteTaskViaUi, settle, forgetLeafByIndex, leafIndexesFor
